rationale: Section 11.13(n) provides a debt-obligation carve-out that operates independently of the exemption amount. Increasing the exemption from $100,000 to $140,000 does not alter the mechanism allowing units to collect debt-pledged taxes without deducting the exemption.
quote: granting the exemption would impair the obligation of the contract creating the debt.
_note: No direct conflict; subsection (n) functions regardless of exemption dollar amount.
